name: harness
description: Harness workflow router for gated Codex Plan, Implement, Review, Repair, and Completion loops.

interface.longDescription: Harness adds an explicit $harness skill for controlled Ralph Loop execution with classification, approval gates, role-separated subagents, clean-context review, repair planning, and completion reporting.
defaultPrompt: Use $harness to plan, implement, and review this task.
Run $harness for a gated repair loop.
